dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Alright, gentlemen, please remain seated and keep your seatbelts fastened."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "I don't know how you guys do this every day," Sam says, his voice trembling.
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his eyes scanning the control panel with a hint of amusement.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, we're just lucky to be on this flight," Leo chimes in, trying to sound calm.
dialogue.visual_cue: Over-the-shoulder shot of SAM, his eyes wide with fear.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "I've been flying for years, and I can assure you, this is a routine flight," Ali says, his voice reassuring.
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his smile faltering for a moment before he regains composure.

dialogue.speaker: ABEEHA
dialogue.line: "Pilots, can I get a status update for the in-flight meal service?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ABEEHA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Abeeha, we're still on schedule, but I'd appreciate it if you could keep an eye on our passengers. They seem a bit... anxious."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ABEEHA, her eyes fixed on Ali as she waits for a response.

dialogue.speaker: ABEEHA
dialogue.line: "Of course, Ali. I'll make sure to keep an eye on them. Would you like me to bring up some calming tea or something?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALI, his expression serious for a moment.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "Everyone, please remain calm. This is just a minor turbulence patch."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALI, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: SAM
dialogue.line: "This is not minor!" Sam exclaims, his voice rising in panic.
dialogue.visual_cue: Wide shot of the cockpit, the instruments beeping wildly in the background.

dialogue.speaker: LEO
dialogue.line: "Yeah, Ali, maybe you should, uh, try to, you know, stabilize the plane or something?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of SAM, his eyes bulging with fear.

dialogue.speaker: ALI
dialogue.line: "I've got everything under control, gentlemen. Just sit back, relax, and trust me."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of LEO, his face scrunched up in worry.
